title: The Escape Narrows Around the Sunny
description: On pages 18–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #17, Luffy as The escape from Totto Land tightens while Luffy’s duel with Katakuri becomes a test of endurance and will.
scene: The Sunny escape, Sanji’s cake plan, and Luffy’s mirror-world duel all converge under Big Mom’s pursuit.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the flower of Haki only truly blooms in the extreme conditions of real battle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The more you face off against strong enemies,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder if I can get myself to see it, too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A little bit of the future, I mean.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Don't get ahead of yourself, Pipsqueak!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to defeat him when he's at full power!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Escape storyline with 16 dialogue beats. Big Mom’s pursuit, the cake delivery, and Luffy’s duel place every escape route under pressure.
